title: gnaphalium pseudohelichrysum
intro: Gnaphalium pseudohelichrysum, also known as the False Dandelion or False Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
